# Device Review and Completion Workflow (2025-12-28 03:19Z)

_**User (2025-12-28 03:21Z)**_

Read `StationpediaPlus/coordination/agent-instructions/REVIEW-INSTRUCTIONS.md` for the full workflow.

Your batch: `StationpediaPlus/coordination/outputs/review-batch-15.json`

For each device:
1. Find ALL logic types from `Stationeers/Stationpedia/Stationpedia.json`
2. Add descriptions for every missing type (use standard descriptions for generic types)
3. VERIFY Mode/Setting/Ratio/Error/Lock against source code in `Assembly-CSharp/`

Output COMPLETE device entries to: `StationpediaPlus/coordination/outputs/review-batch-15-complete.json`

Work autonomously. Read source code for device-specific types. Complete all devices before reporting.

    "original": "$devices = @('ThingStructureTankSmallFuel','ThingStructureMediumRocketGasFuelTank','ThingRobot','ThingStructureVendingMachine','ThingStructureLarreDockHydroponics','ThingStructureInteriorDoorPaddedThin','ThingStructureLiquidPressureRegulator','ThingStructureLiquidVolumePump','ThingModularDeviceConsole','ThingStructurePipeHeater','ThingStructureWaterBottleFillerPowered','ThingStructurePipeLiquidOneWayValveLever','ThingModularDeviceLight','ThingModularDeviceRoundButton','ThingStructureLogicDial','ThingStructureProximitySensor','ThingModularDeviceThrottle3x2','ThingStructurePassiveLiquidDrain'); $json = Get-Content 'C:\\Dev\\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\\Stationeers\\Stationpedia\\Stationpedia.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $output = @(); foreach($d in $devices) { $entry = $json.pages | Where-Object {$_.Key -eq $d}; if($entry) { $logics = @{}; foreach($l in $entry.LogicInsert) { if($l.LogicName -match 'LogicType\\.(\\w+)') { $logics[$matches[1]] = @{access=$l.LogicAccessTypes} } }; $slots = @(); if($entry.Slots) { foreach($s in $entry.Slots) { $slots += @{name=$s.SlotName; type=$s.SlotType} } }; $output += @{device=$d; title=($entry.Title -replace '&lt;[^&gt;]+&gt;',''); logics=$logics; slots=$slots; logicCount=$logics.Count} } }; $output | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 | Out-File 'C:\\Dev\\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\\batch15_logic_data.json' -Encoding UTF8; Write-Host \"Extracted logic data for $($output.Count) devices\" -ForegroundColor Green; $output | ForEach-Object { Write-Host \"  $($_.title): $($_.logicCount) logic types\" }"
